mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id, n.member_id, n.title, n.content, m.name AS author_name, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notice n INNER JOIN member m ON m.member_id = n.member_id ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.notice_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT n.notice_id, n.member_id, n.title, n.content, m.name AS author_name, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notice n INNER JOIN member m ON m.member_id = n.member_id WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
